mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO video_like (user_id, video_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{videoId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM video_like WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND video_id=#{videoId}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM video_like WHERE user_id=#{userId} AND video_id=#{videoId})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM video_like WHERE video_id=#{videoId}
SELECT video_id FROM video_like WHERE user_id=#{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
